mechanism_narrative: A falling federal funds rate lowers discount rates and eases financial conditions, lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the policy rate is already above the recent inflation trend.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS declines over the last 3 months while CPIAUCSL is flat or rising less than 0.2% month-over-month
failure_condition: The hypothesis is rejected if triggered observations do not show higher 20-day SPX returns than non-triggered observations, or if the sign flips and triggered periods deliver negative median forward returns across rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals weakening household income and earnings risk, which should pressure equities and generate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days after the labor market turns down.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months or PAYEMS declines for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment upturn triggers are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the conditional mean forward return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 50 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth raises evidence of resilient final demand and supports revenue expectations, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days when sales momentum is accelerating.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth is positive for 2 consecutive monthly releases and the latest reading is above its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS momentum does not precede positive 5-day SPX returns at a rate above 55%, or if the signal loses positive rank correlation in any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Improving industrial production together with rising housing starts signals broad real activity strength and cyclical earnings momentum, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined INDPRO and HOUST signal does not outperform each series alone in out-of-sample 60-day prediction, or if joint-strength periods fail to produce above-median SPX returns.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration combined with a still-low policy rate implies a rising real-rate adjustment risk; equities should underperform over the next 20 trading days when CPI is outpacing policy accommodation.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises more than 0.4% month-over-month while FEDFUNDS remains below 2.0%
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-plus-low-rate triggers are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the triggered conditional drawdown is not worse than baseline by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment rate combined with expanding payrolls signals sustained income growth and reduced recession risk, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is at or below 4.0% and PAYEMS is above its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-unemployment/high-payroll condition fails to deliver positive 60-day SPX returns in at least 55% of instances, or if the conditional average return is not above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts are a leading signal for construction activity, credit demand, and consumer confidence; a rising HOUST trend should support S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the housing cycle is improving.
candidate_trigger: HOUST increases for 2 consecutive months and exceeds its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if rising housing-start episodes do not correspond to positive 20-day SPX returns more often than 50% of the time, or if the signal has negative IC over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production strengthens while unemployment falls, the economy is likely in a genuine cyclical upswing rather than a temporary bounce, which should produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint strength in INDPRO and falling UNRATE does not lead to positive 5-day SPX returns at a rate above baseline, or if the combined signal is not statistically distinguishable from zero in walk-forward tests.
